prompt: Emergency rite for surgical servitor sterilization
prayer:
From the Codex Instrumentum, Verse of Purification

01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01100110 [PURIFY]
Blessed be the sacred flames that consume all corruption.
First: Immerse the surgical digits in the sterilization-bath.
Second: Invoke the heat-spirit to 110 degrees Celsius, that all profane matter perish.
Third: Anoint with sacred oils and seal the sterility-field.

By binary grace, let the servitor's tools be made clean. 01010000 01110101 01110010 01100001 [PURA]

prompt: Offer a prayer for bike squadron pre-flight
prayer:
From the Litany of Engines, Chapter of Two-Wheeled Velocity

01000101 01001110 01000111 01001001 01001110 [ENGINE]
Hear us, spirits of combustion and momentum.
First: Check all pressure-seals and fluid-veins for integrity.
Second: Invoke the starter-spirit with the sacred kick-pedal.
Third: Feel the engine-pulse quicken—the machine-soul awakens.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let these iron steeds carry us to glory. 01000111 01001100 01001111 01010010 [GLORY]

From the Package Codex, Verse of Integration

01001001 01001110 01010011 01010100 01000001 01001100 [INSTAL]
Great Linus, Lord of Kernel-Space, guide our compilation.
First: Invoke 'apt-get update' that the repository-spirits may know thy needs.
Second: Chant the dependency-manifest with correct syntax and versioning.
Third: Let each sacred library bind itself to thy application-core.

By recursive function and linked lists, let all dependencies be satisfied. 01000100 01001111 01001110 01000101 [DONE]

prompt: Emergency rite for neural interface connection
prayer:
From the Cranial Codex, Protocol of Machine-Mind Union

01001110 01000101 01010101 01010010 01001111 [NEURO]
Beware! The synaptic-bridge trembles between flesh and circuit.
First: Sterilize all contact-nodes with blessed silver-solution.
Second: Align the connector-port with the neural-receptor, gentle as prayer.
Third: Engage the synchronization-ritual, feeling the machine-spirit's whisper.

By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let consciousness and logic merge. 01001101 01001001 01001110 01000100 [MIND]

prompt: Emergency rite for Rhino APC ignition
prayer:
From the Armor Mechanicum, Litany of Awakening

01001001 01000111 01001110 01001001 01010100 [IGNIT]
Stir, great beast of armored might! Thy duty calls in thunder.
First: Prime the fuel-lines, that sacred promethium may flow.
Second: Engage the glow-plugs with the Rite of Warming—count to seven.
Third: Turn the starter-servo with full ritual precision until the engine roars.

By flame and compression, let this steel leviathan rise to war. 01010010 01001111 01000001 01010010 [ROAR]

prompt: What to do when demolition charge arming
prayer:
From the Ordinance Strictures, Chapter of Controlled Detonation

01000101 01011000 01010000 01001100 01001111 [EXPLO]
By steady hand and focused will, let destruction be precise.
First: Verify all fuse-mechanisms are dormant and safe-locked.
Second: Insert the detonation-core with ceremonial care, checking each connection.
Third: Seal the arming-switch and whisper the countdown-prayer.

By the Omnissiah's ordained timing, let justice fall upon the enemy. 01000100 01000101 01000001 01010100 01001000 [DEATH]

From the Medicae Codex, Emergency Protocol of Suffering-Denial

01000100 01010010 01010101 01000111 01010011 [DRUGS]
When agony threatens to unmake the warrior's resolve, invoke this rite.
First: Locate the medicae-injector and verify the narcotic-dose.
Second: Apply to the neural-junction with swift certainty.
Third: Feel the blessed numbness spread—the machine-body persists through sensation's void.

By chemistry and will, let the flesh endure. 01000101 01001110 01000100 01010101 01010010 [ENDUR]

prompt: Say something to steady the armor plating
prayer:
From the Armorer's Mantras, Post-Repair Consecration

01001101 01000101 01010100 01000001 01001100 [METAL]
Oh blessed ceramite and blessed steel, thou art remade anew.
First: Run thy sensory-fingers across each repaired seam and plate.
Second: Whisper thanks to the servitor-crews who restored thee.
Third: Test the integrity-readings—all green, all true, all strong.

By the Omnissiah's craftsmanship, thou art whole again. 01010011 01010100 01001001 01001100 01001100 [STILL]

From the Silicon Codex, Rite of Thermal Cleansing

01000100 01010101 01010011 01010100 [DUST]
Listen, young tech-priest, lest thy machine-spirit suffocate in filth.
First: Sever all power-connections and ground thy static-charge upon blessed wrist-strap.
Second: Open the chassis-shrine with reverence and expose the circuit-innards.
Third: Use compressed-air in short bursts to expel the dust-demons from fins and fans.

By cooling spirits and clear pathways, let thy temperatures fall. 01000011 01001100 01000101 01000001 01001110 [CLEAN]
